title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. umbraticola
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. umbraticola, also known as a rare subspecies of Hawkweed, is a perennial plant with yellow flowers that grow in shaded areas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. umbraticola include its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, it can be used as a tincture, tea, or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
